mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(t.target) AS target, COUNT(DISTINCT c.drug_id) AS drug_count FROM ci_tracking_latest c CROSS JOIN LATERAL unnest(c.targets) AS t(target) WHERE c.disease_id = #{diseaseId} GROUP BY TRIM(t.target) ORDER BY drug_count DESC, TRIM(t.target)
SELECT COALESCE(name_en, name_cn) FROM disease WHERE id = #{diseaseId}
